mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.nick_name, u.real_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.sex, u.city, u.status, u.del_flag, u.ext_info, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, dept_id, nick_name, real_name, email, avatar, sex, city, status, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{nickName}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{sex}, #{city}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
